title: Address review feedback on Blazor sample CI integration
body:
Addresses three review comments from the Blazor sample PR.

- **`nuget.config`** — Remove `nuget.org` source; `SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor` is now mirrored to `dotnet-public`
- **`builds-docs.yml`** — Remove `id-token: write` permission; not needed when deploying via `peaceiris/actions-gh-pages` with `github_token`
- **`404.html`** — Move SPA redirect file from inline CI generation into source at `samples/SkiaSharpDemo.Blazor/wwwroot/404.html`; copied to deploy output automatically by `dotnet publish`
